2605.30150.title: Anchorless Diversification for Parallel LLM Ideation
2605.30150.paper_summary: LLMs are increasingly used to generate candidate-idea pools for creative tasks where broad exploration is valuable. Parallel inference can be attractive in this setting when it broadens the pool while retaining quality and cost efficiency. We study inference-time controls for candidate-pool diversification, asking whether anchorless methods can rival methods that depend on observed seed ideas. Across three creative task families, we compare independent generation and semantic direction stratification with self-, peer-, and representative-anchor baselines, under neutral and population-referential divergent instructions. Population-referential divergence is a strong low-cost baseline, increasing semantic diversity while preserving quality proxies. Semantic direction stratification is stronger: a single planning call organizes generations across broad semantic directions, yielding the best diversity--quality--compute frontier. Anchored regeneration can be strong in final-pool diversity, but its advantage shrinks under full-pipeline token accounting. These results establish practical anchorless baselines for open-ended LLM ideation.
2605.30150.paper_summary_zh: LLMs 在創意任務中越來越多地被用來生成候選想法池，這種情況下廣泛探索是有價值的。平行推理在這種情境中可能具有吸引力，因為它在擴大池的同時保持質量和成本效率。我們研究了候選池多樣化的推理時間控制，詢問無錨方法是否能與依賴觀察到的種子想法的方法相媲美。在三個創意任務類別中，我們比較了獨立生成和語義方向分層，並以自我、同儕和代表性錨點基準進行比較，這些比較是在中立和人口參照的發散指示下進行的。人口參照的發散是一個強大的低成本基準，能在保持質量代理的同時增加語義多樣性。語義方向分層更強：一次規劃調用可以在廣泛的語義方向上組織生成，產生最佳的多樣性-質量-計算邊界。錨定再生在最終池的多樣性上可能很強，但在完全管道的標記計算下，其優勢縮小。這些結果為開放式 LLM 構思建立了實用的無錨基準。
2605.30150.author: Fares Nabil Ibrahim et.al.
2605.30150.authors: Fares Nabil Ibrahim, Nafis Saami Azad, Raiyan Abdul Baten
